cards.front: What is the HTTP Method for reading data from a server?
What is the HTTP Status Code for a successful HTTP Request?
What is the purpose of the RequestDispatcher in a Servlet?
cards.back: To forward an HTTP Request to another resource

cards.front: What is the HTTP Status Code for a server refusing a connection request?
What is the purpose of the PrintWriter in handling HTTP Responses?
cards.back: To write data to the client in the HTTP Response Body
